2604.08460.title: A Machine Learning Framework for Turbofan Health Estimation via Inverse Problem Formulation
2604.08460.paper_summary: Estimating the health state of turbofan engines is a challenging ill-posed inverse problem, hindered by sparse sensing and complex nonlinear thermodynamics. Research in this area remains fragmented, with comparisons limited by the use of unrealistic datasets and insufficient exploration of the exploitation of temporal information. This work investigates how to recover component-level health indicators from operational sensor data under realistic degradation and maintenance patterns. To support this study, we introduce a new dataset that incorporates industry-oriented complexities such as maintenance events and usage changes. Using this dataset, we establish an initial benchmark that compares steady-state and nonstationary data-driven models, and Bayesian filters, classic families of methods used to solve this problem. In addition to this benchmark, we introduce self-supervised learning (SSL) approaches that learn latent representations without access to true health labels, a scenario reflective of real-world operational constraints. By comparing the downstream estimation performance of these unsupervised representations against the direct prediction baselines, we establish a practical lower bound on the difficulty of solving this inverse problem. Our results reveal that traditional filters remain strong baselines, while SSL methods reveal the intrinsic complexity of health estimation and highlight the need for more advanced and interpretable inference strategies. For reproducibility, both the generated dataset and the implementation used in this work are made accessible.
2604.08460.paper_summary_zh: 估計渦扇發動機的健康狀態是一個具有挑戰性的病態反問題，受到稀疏感測和複雜非線性熱力學的阻礙。這個領域的研究仍然是支離破碎的，因為比較受到不現實數據集的限制，以及對時間信息利用的探索不足。這項工作研究如何在現實的退化和維護模式下，從操作傳感器數據中恢復組件級健康指標。為了支持這項研究，我們引入了一個新的數據集，該數據集考慮了行業導向的複雜性，例如維護事件和使用變化。利用這個數據集，我們建立了一個初步基準，對比穩態和非穩態數據驅動模型，以及貝葉斯濾波器，這些都是用來解決這個問題的經典方法家族。除了這個基準，我們還引入了自我監督學習（SSL）方法，這些方法在沒有真實健康標籤的情況下學習潛在表示，這是一種反映現實操作約束的情境。通過將這些無監督表示的下游估計性能與直接預測基準進行比較，我們確立了解決這個反問題的難度的實際下限。我們的結果顯示，傳統濾波器仍然是強有力的基準，而SSL方法揭示了健康估計的內在複雜性，並強調了對更先進和可解釋的推斷策略的需求。為了可重複性，這項工作中生成的數據集和實施方法都已公開。
2604.08460.author: Milad Leyli-Abadi et.al.
2604.08460.authors: Milad Leyli-Abadi, Lucas Thil, Sebastien Razakarivony, Guillaume Doquet, Jesse Read
